title: senna bracteosa
intro: Senna bracteosa is a species of flowering plant in the pea family, commonly known as a shrub or small tree, native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its laxative properties, due to its high concentration of anthraquinone glycosides, particularly sennosides A and B. Senna bracteosa offers various health benefits, including the relief of constipation, reduction of inflammation, and support for digestive health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using Senna bracteosa for medicinal purposes.
